## Legend

| Symbol | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| ‚úÖ | Fully covered ‚Äî source files and tests exist |
| ‚öÝÔ∏è | Partially covered ‚Äî source exists but tests are missing or indirect |
| ‚ùå | Missing ‚Äî no source or test coverage found |
